description: Subquery in aggregate SELECT references ungrouped column with multiple CTEs and nested subqueries
fixed_query:
WITH
  paid_charges AS (
    SELECT
      customer_id,
      created,
      amount
    FROM stripe_data.charge
    WHERE status = 'succeeded'
  ),
  failed_charges AS (
    SELECT
      customer_id,
      created
    FROM stripe_data.charge
    WHERE status = 'failed'
  ),
  weekly_aggregates AS (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('week', pc.created) AS week,
      pc.customer_id,
      pc.amount
    FROM paid_charges pc
  )
SELECT
  week,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN amount
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS paid_amount,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN amount > 1000 THEN 1
      ELSE NULL
    END
  ) AS high_value_count,
  (
    SELECT SUM(amount)
    FROM paid_charges pc2
    WHERE customer_id NOT IN (
      SELECT customer_id
      FROM failed_charges
    )
    AND DATE_TRUNC('week', pc2.created) = week
  ) AS clean_customer_revenue,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM stripe_data.customer cu
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('week', cu.created) = week
  ) AS new_customers
FROM weekly_aggregates
GROUP BY week
ORDER BY week
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
WITH
  paid_charges AS (
    SELECT
      customer_id,
      created,
      amount
    FROM stripe_data.charge
    WHERE status = 'succeeded'
  ),
  failed_charges AS (
    SELECT
      customer_id,
      created
    FROM stripe_data.charge
    WHERE status = 'failed'
  )
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('week', pc.created) AS week,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN pc.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN pc.amount
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS paid_amount,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN pc.amount > 1000 THEN 1
      ELSE NULL
    END
  ) AS high_value_count,
  (
    SELECT SUM(amount)
    FROM paid_charges pc2
    WHERE customer_id NOT IN (
      SELECT customer_id
      FROM failed_charges
    )
    AND DATE_TRUNC('week', pc2.created) = DATE_TRUNC('week', pc.created)
  ) AS clean_customer_revenue,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM stripe_data.customer cu
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('week', cu.created) = DATE_TRUNC('week', pc.created)
  ) AS new_customers
FROM paid_charges pc
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', pc.created)
ORDER BY week
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: subquery uses ungrouped column "pc.created" from outer query
  Position: 855
